title: Decide R1 non-Neo display and possible LR1121 support boundary
description: Why this exists: Zephyr feasibility research found possible Muzi Base/R1 display SH1107 and possible LR1121 variant questions, while the R1 Neo MVP path is SX1262/no-screen. What needs to be done: decide whether non-Neo R1 display/LR1121 support is in MVP or documented unsupported. Acceptance criteria: R1 MVP docs and board targets do not imply unsupported display or LR1121 functionality; separate driver work exists if included.
